name: Lemon Cream Cheese Tarts (Mini Cheesecakes)
recipeIngredient: 1 can Thank You Cherry Pie filling
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat all ingredients together with an electric mixer until well combined.
2. Line tart tins (or use a tart pan and paper wrappers) with parchment paper.
3. Place the vanilla wafers flat side up on the prepared tins.
4. Fill each tart shell about 3/4 full with the cream cheese mixture.
5. Place a cherry on top, without juice.
6. Bake for 15 minutes at 350°F.
7. Allow to cool in the tins before serving.
8. Store any leftovers in the refrigerator if not serving immediately.
